revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is like [[mw:Help:Extension:ParserFunctions##ifeq|#ifeq]], but does not [[m:Help:Newlines_and_spaces#Trimming_on_expansion|trim]] the "then" and "else" part. === Usage === *<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{ifeq|"abc"|"abc"| 1 | 0 }}</syntaxhighlight> gives "{{ifeq|"abc"|"abc"| 1 | 0 }}" *<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{ifeq|"abc"|"def"| 1 | 0 }}</syntaxhighlight> gives "{{ifeq|"abc"|"def"| 1 | 0 }}" *<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{ifeq|{{PAGENAME}}|Ifeq| 1 | 0 }}</syntaxhighlight> gives "{{ifeq|{{PAGENAME}}|Ifeq| 1 | 0 }}"
=== See also === *{{tl|If}} *[[m:Template:Ifeq]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Parameter selection templates]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is like [[mw:Help:Extension:ParserFunctions##ifeq|#ifeq]], but does not [[m:Help:Newlines_and_spaces#Trimming_on_expansion|trim]] the "then" and "else" part. === Usage === *<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{ifeq|"abc"|"abc"| 1 | 0 }}</syntaxhighlight> gives "{{ifeq|"abc"|"abc"| 1 | 0 }}" *<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{ifeq|"abc"|"def"| 1 | 0 }}</syntaxhighlight> gives "{{ifeq|"abc"|"def"| 1 | 0 }}" *<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{ifeq|{{PAGENAME}}|Ifeq| 1 | 0 }}</syntaxhighlight> gives "{{ifeq|{{PAGENAME}}|Ifeq| 1 | 0 }}"
=== See also === *{{tl|If}} *[[m:Template:Ifeq]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Parameter selection templates]] }}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is like [[mw:Help:Extension:ParserFunctions##ifeq|#ifeq]], but does not [[m:Help:Newlines_and_spaces#Trimming_on_expansion|trim]] the "then" and "else" part. === Usage === *<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{ifeq|"abc"|"abc"| 1 | 0 }}</syntaxhighlight> gives "{{ifeq|"abc"|"abc"| 1 | 0 }}" *<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{ifeq|"abc"|"def"| 1 | 0 }}</syntaxhighlight> gives "{{ifeq|"abc"|"def"| 1 | 0 }}" *<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{ifeq|{{PAGENAME}}|Ifeq| 1 | 0 }}</syntaxhighlight> gives "{{ifeq|{{PAGENAME}}|Ifeq| 1 | 0 }}"
=== See also === *{{tl|If}} *[[m:Template:Ifeq]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Parameter selection templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
